sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74060" key="o)ne/lafos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀν-έλᾰφος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄνος</etym>) a kind of <sense id="n74060.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">antelope</tr_> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τραγέλαφος</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
